finding: The Cloudflare control-plane probe previously retained bounded provider error messages. Even with token-shaped substring redaction, provider-controlled text remained an unnecessary privacy and provenance surface.

improvement.policy: Retain at most eight diagnostics, discard all provider messages, preserve only allowlisted numeric Cloudflare codes, and classify every other error generically.

verification.route: isolated Node 22 compatible runtime using byte-equivalent committed module and test content
cases: provider messages and token-like text are absent from sanitized output
unknown codes fail closed to null
diagnostic retention is capped at eight records

limits: No live Cloudflare API request was performed.
No GitHub Actions workflow execution was observed.
No Cloudflare deployment or resolving hostname was proven.
The allowlist must be revised if Cloudflare changes documented error codes needed for operations.
falsification_route: Reject this slice if a committed or live probe artifact contains any provider error message, non-allowlisted numeric code, more than eight diagnostics, a credential value, or an account identifier.
